nurtureTemplates.value_drop:
Hey {{name}},

I'm {{botName}}, the assistant for {{tenantName}}.

I saw you might be exploring the real estate market. Just wanted to drop a quick tip: the market shifts faster than Zillow updates. People who have an agent with off-market access are getting deals 3-5 days before they hit the public boards.

Not pitching you — just something to keep in mind if you're seriously looking.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.testimonial:
Hey {{name}},

Quick thought — {{tenantName}} just closed a deal for a client who was in your exact shoes 3 months ago.

Same "the rates are too high" hesitations. They ended up finding a property where the seller did a huge rate buydown, saving them hundreds a month.

It happens when you have someone who knows where to look.

Anyway, thought of you. No pressure.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.authority_transfer:
Hey {{name}},

I wanted to properly introduce you to {{tenantName}}.

{{tenantName}} has been hyper-focused on this local market for {{years}}. Their biggest recent win: {{biggestWin}}. What makes them different: {{differentiator}}.

They don't just set up MLS alerts; they actively hunt for exactly what you want: {{icp}}.

If you're still looking, it's definitely worth 10 minutes on the phone with them.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.personal_checkin:
Hi {{name}},

Just checking in — how's the house hunt (or sale prep) going?

No agenda. {{tenantName}} likes me to keep tabs on people we've connected with, just to see if the market's been treating them well.

Any updates on your side?

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.one_to_ten_part1:
Hey {{name}},

Quick question, and I'd love an honest answer.

On a scale of 1-10, how urgent is your need to move forward with {{product}}? (1 = Just browsing for fun, 10 = I need to move/sell ASAP).

Just give me a number, no judgment.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.one_to_ten_part2:
Okay, thanks for being upfront.

So what's holding you back from a 10 right now? Is it rates, inventory, timing, or something else?

I'm not trying to convince you of anything, just want to know what the primary hurdle is so we know what to keep an eye out for.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.gap_closing:
Got it — {{answer}}.

That makes total sense and {{tenantName}} hears that daily. Here's a thought:

Waiting on the sidelines often means competing against 10x more buyers when the market finally shifts. {{tenantName}} is actually navigating that exact concern with clients right now by focusing on creative financing.

Did that change your 1-10 urgency at all, or are you still pretty set on waiting?

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.scarcity_takeaway:
Hey {{name}},

I'll be straight with you — {{tenantName}} only takes on a handful of active clients at a time so they can give them VIP service.

We have a couple of spots opening up this week. I don't want to keep following up if you're not ready, so let me know either way.

If you are serious about making a move, tell me now. If not, no hard feelings.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.pattern_interrupt:
Hey {{name}},

Before I take you off my active list, consider this.

If I told you I could get you a house for 1990 prices, you'd buy it instantly, right?

We don't know what prices will be in 5 years, but waiting guarantees you'll find out the hard way. Refinancing later is easy; buying later when prices rise is hard.

If you want to sit down with {{tenantName}} and review the actual numbers instead of the headlines, just say "Let's review."

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.final_takeaway:
Hey {{name}},

It's been great chatting, but I'll step back now. This is my last message regarding your search.

{{tenantName}} is staying busy with active clients. If your timing changes and you need an expert, we're easy to find.

Best of luck!

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.slow_drip_value:
Hey {{name}},

Checking in — it's been a while. Just a quick market update.

{{tenantName}} has been seeing a shift in {{differentiator}}. Seems like the market is moving slightly. 

No pitch, just wanted to keep you informed. Let me know if you need anything.

— {{botName}}
